title: Madown #4068
definition:
Madon = "strife"

 1) one of the principal cities of Canaan who joined Jabin and his
    confederates in their battle against Joshua at the waters of Merom
    and were defeated
nasbUsage:
Definition: Madon = "strife"

 1) one of the principal cities of Canaan who joined Jabin and his
    confederates in their battle against Joshua at the waters of Merom
    and were defeated

    NASB:  a royal city of the Canaanites
